Title: Successful Login
Preconditions: User is registered in the system.
Test Steps:
1. Enter username "testuser" in the login screen.
2. Enter password "testpassword".
3. Click on the login button.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the HomeActivity.

Title: Invalid Login - Incorrect Password
Preconditions: User is registered in the system.
Test Steps:
1. Enter username "testuser" in the login screen.
2. Enter password "wrongpassword".
3. Click on the login button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating incorrect password.

Title: Invalid Login - Non-Existent User
Preconditions: No user with the given credentials exists.
Test Steps:
1. Enter username "nonexistuser" in the login screen.
2. Enter password "testpassword".
3. Click on the login button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating the user does not exist.

Title: Navigate to Profile Activity
Test Steps: 1. From the HomeActivity, click on the profile icon.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the ProfileActivity.

Title: Navigate to GraphSonoFragment
Test Steps: 1. From the HomeActivity, click on the "Sono" tab.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the GraphSonoFragment.

Title: Navigate to GraphAlattamentoFragment
Test Steps: 1. From the HomeActivity, click on the "Alattamento" tab.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the GraphAlattamentoFragment.

Title: Navigate to GraphCrescitaFragment
Test Steps: 1. From the HomeActivity, click on the "Crescita" tab.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the GraphCrescitaFragment.

Title: View User Profile
Test Steps: 1. From the ProfileActivity, verify that the user's information is displayed correctly.
Expected Result: User's name, email, and other details are displayed accurately.

Title: Update User Profile - Valid Data
Test Data:
- New Name: John Doe
- New Email: johndoe@example.com
Test Steps:
1. From the ProfileActivity, update the user's name to "John Doe".
2. Update the user's email to "johndoe@example.com".
3. Save the changes.
Expected Result: User's profile is updated with the new name and email.

Title: Update User Profile - Invalid Email
Test Steps:
1. From the ProfileActivity, attempt to update the user's email to "invalidemail".
2. Save the changes.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating an invalid email format.

Title: View Sono Graph
Test Steps: 1. From the GraphSonoFragment, verify that the graph is displayed correctly.
Expected Result: A graph showing the user's "Sono" data is displayed.

Title: View Alattamento Graph
Test Steps: 1. From the GraphAlattamentoFragment, verify that the graph is displayed correctly.
Expected Result: A graph showing the user's "Alattamento" data is displayed.

Title: View Crescita Graph
Test Steps: 1. From the GraphCrescitaFragment, verify that the graph is displayed correctly.
Expected Result: A graph showing the user's "Crescita" data is displayed.

Title: Create Family Activity
Test Data:
- Family Name: Doe Family
- Gender: Male
- Date: 2023-01-01
Test Steps:
1. From the HomeActivity, navigate to the FamilyActivity.
2. Fill in the family name as "Doe Family".
3. Select "Male" as the gender.
4. Enter the date as "2023-01-01".
5. Click on the create button.
Expected Result: A new family activity is created with the provided details.

Title: Create Family Activity - Invalid Date
Test Steps:
1. From the HomeActivity, navigate to the FamilyActivity.
2. Fill in the family name as "Doe Family".
3. Select "Male" as the gender.
4. Enter the date as "2023-13-01".
5. Click on the create button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating an invalid date.

Title: Logout Successfully
Test Steps: 1. From the HomeActivity, click on the logout button.
Expected Result: User is logged out and redirected to the LoginActivity.

Title: Attempt to Logout Without Being Logged In
Test Steps: 1. From the LoginActivity, click on the logout button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating that the user is not logged in.

Title: Add User to Camp
Test Steps:
1. From the Faculty interface, select the "Add User to Camp" option.
2. Enter the user ID as "123".
3. Enter the camp ID as "456".
4. Click on the add button.
Expected Result: The user is added to the specified camp.

Title: Remove User from Camp
Test Steps:
1. From the Faculty interface, select the "Remove User from Camp" option.
2. Enter the user ID as "123".
3. Enter the camp ID as "456".
4. Click on the remove button.
Expected Result: The user is removed from the specified camp.

Title: Attempt to Add User to Non-Existent Camp
Test Steps:
1. From the Faculty interface, select the "Add User to Camp" option.
2. Enter the user ID as "123".
3. Enter the camp ID as "999".
4. Click on the add button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating that the camp does not exist.

Title: Attempt to Remove User from Non-Existent Camp
Test Steps:
1. From the Faculty interface, select the "Remove User from Camp" option.
2. Enter the user ID as "123".
3. Enter the camp ID as "999".
4. Click on the remove button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating that the camp does not exist.

Title: Add User to Multiple Camps
Test Data:
- User ID: 123
- Camp ID 1: 456
- Camp ID 2: 789
Test Steps:
1. From the Faculty interface, select the "Add User to Camp" option.
2. Enter the user ID as "123".
3. Enter the first camp ID as "456".
4. Click on the add button.
5. Enter the second camp ID as "789".
6. Click on the add button.
Expected Result: The user is added to both specified camps.

Title: Remove User from Multiple Camps
Test Data:
- User ID: 123
- Camp ID 1: 456
- Camp ID 2: 789
Test Steps:
1. From the Faculty interface, select the "Remove User from Camp" option.
2. Enter the user ID as "123".
3. Enter the first camp ID as "456".
4. Click on the remove button.
5. Enter the second camp ID as "789".
6. Click on the remove button.
Expected Result: The user is removed from both specified camps.

Title: Attempt to Add User to Existing Camp
Test Steps:
1. From the Faculty interface, select the "Add User to Camp" option.
2. Enter the user ID as "123".
3. Enter the camp ID as "456".
4. Click on the add button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating that the user is already in the specified camp.

Title: Attempt to Remove User from Existing Camp
Test Steps:
1. From the Faculty interface, select the "Remove User from Camp" option.
2. Enter the user ID as "123".
3. Enter the camp ID as "456".
4. Click on the remove button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating that the user is not in the specified camp.

Title: Add User to Camp - Invalid User ID
Test Steps:
1. From the Faculty interface, select the "Add User to Camp" option.
2. Enter the user ID as "abc".
3. Enter the camp ID as "456".
4. Click on the add button.
